hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys, json; d = json.load(sys.stdin); p = d.get('file_path', ''); (sys.stderr.write('Blocked: raw/ is immutable — TheSecondBrain Rule 1. Write to wiki/ instead.\n') or sys.exit(2)) if ('/raw/' in p or p.startswith('raw/')) else None"

python3 -c "import sys, json; d = json.load(sys.stdin); p = d.get('file_path', ''); (sys.stderr.write('Blocked: raw/ is immutable — TheSecondBrain Rule 1. Edit wiki/ pages instead.\n') or sys.exit(2)) if ('/raw/' in p or p.startswith('raw/')) else None"
